# Direct runtime dependencies. The production image installs from
# requirements.lock.txt (hash-pinned, generated by `uv export` — see below);
# this file is the human-edited manifest. Keep it in sync with
# [project.dependencies] in pyproject.toml, then run:
#   uv lock && uv export --format requirements-txt -o requirements.lock.txt
APScheduler==3.11.2
# Brotli decoder: the shared HTTP session advertises Accept-Encoding derived
# from what urllib3 can decode; installing brotli turns "br" support on
# (nadoexplorer's edge serves brotli-compressed JSON — 2026-07-14 incident).
Brotli==1.1.0
cryptography==48.0.1
eth-account>=0.8.0,<0.9.0
# Direct dependency (lowiq_relay_client, hl_client); also pulled in by openai.
httpx>=0.27,<1.0
nado-protocol==0.3.3
openai==2.17.0
Pillow>=10.4.0
pinecone>=8.1,<9.0
psycopg2-binary==2.9.11
python-dotenv==1.2.2
python-telegram-bot[webhooks]==22.6
requests==2.33.0
websockets>=10.0.0,<14.0.0
